cluster_run_date: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
region: string
algorithm: string not null
content_hash: string not null
embedding_model: string not null
cluster_id: int64 not null
member_role: string not null
cluster_size: int64 not null
distance_to_centroid: double
avg_intra_cluster_distance: double
cluster_label: string
job_run_id: string not null
run_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
pipeline_version: string not null
schema_version: int64 not null
source_type: string not null
tenant_id: string
